title: Route writeDefaultBootstrap → buildFabricBootstrapGuide
description: doctor.ts:665-669 writeDefaultBootstrap is a 70-byte stub; doctor --fix produces an inferior bootstrap vs fab init's buildFabricBootstrapGuide. One-line fix: route to the same builder.
scope: Layer 2 P1 — UX consistency between init and doctor --fix

files.change: Lines 665-669: writeDefaultBootstrap calls buildFabricBootstrapGuide(projectRoot) instead of inline 70-byte template
Add test: doctor --fix bootstrap output equals fab init bootstrap output

criteria: Bootstrap byte-equality test passes (doctor --fix == fab init)
